title: Gooey Tunisian Cherry Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful lacto-vegetarian-friendly tagine recipe featuring cherries, inspired by the bold flavors of Tunisian cuisine.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook for 5 minutes until softened.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 2 minutes more.
Add the sliced almonds and cook for 2-3 minutes until lightly toasted.
Add the dried cherries and cook for 2-3 minutes until rehydrated.
Add the cherry jam, Tunisian spices, and salt. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and lemon juice.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
Serve over couscous or with pita bread and enjoy!
